patients.title: Patients
patients.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this patient?
patients.privacyNotice: Patient information is embedded in this hand-off report and is not stored as a separate permanent record.
patients.dataRetentionPolicy: Reports are subject to your organization's data retention policy.
patients.manageCensus: Manage patient census, profile details, and status

patients.permanentlyDelete: Permanently delete this patient and all associated handovers? This action cannot be undone.
patients.uncheckToMarkInactive: Uncheck to mark this patient as inactive/discharged

settings.title: Settings
settings.uploadCustomLogo: Upload a custom logo to replace the default Chronofy logo. The logo appears in the header.
settings.logoRecommendations: Recommended: PNG or SVG format, transparent background, max 2MB
settings.clickToUpload: Click to upload a new logo
settings.biweeklyDefaultsDesc: Set organization defaults used when creating full-time and part-time staff entries. Values are per bi-weekly period (2 weeks).
settings.biweeklyTargetsRange: Bi-weekly targets must be between 0 and 336
settings.adminOnlyTargets: Only admins can update weekly targets
settings.manageTeams: Manage teams that can be assigned to patients and staff.
settings.manageRooms: Manage rooms that can be assigned to patients. These rooms appear as suggestions when adding patients.
settings.cleanupOldHandoffs: Clean up old hand-off reports to keep your database manageable.
settings.confirmDeleteHandoffs: Are you sure you want to delete old hand-offs?
settings.deleteHandoffsWarning: This will permanently delete all hand-off reports older than {days} days. This action cannot be undone.
settings.confirmCleanup: Are you sure you want to delete old data?
settings.name: Name
settings.logoUpdated: Logo updated successfully! All organization members will see the new logo.
settings.fileSizeLimit: File size must be less than 2MB
settings.adminOnlyLogo: Only admins can update the organization logo
settings.adminOnlyResetLogo: Only admins can reset the organization logo
settings.confirmTransferAdmin:
Are you sure you want to transfer admin role to {name}?

You will become a regular member and lose admin privileges. This action cannot be undone by you.
settings.usedInviteCode: These users used your invite code and are waiting for your approval before they can access the system.
settings.transferAdminRoleDesc: Transfer your admin role to another approved member. You will become a regular member after the transfer.
settings.noOtherApprovedMembers: No other approved members to transfer admin role to.
settings.leaveOrganizationNote: You will lose access to all data within this organization.
settings.leaveOrganizationAdminNote: As an admin, you can only leave if there is at least one other admin.
settings.confirmLeave: Are you sure you want to leave "{name}"? You will lose access to all organization data.
settings.staffingRequirementsDefaultsDesc: Set the default minimum staff required per shift. These values pre-fill the Staff Requirements table when creating a new schedule.
settings.shareInviteCode: Share this code with your team members so they can join your organization.
settings.pendingApprovalsDesc: These users used your invite code and are waiting for your approval before they can access the system.
settings.transferAdminDesc: Transfer your admin role to another approved member. You will become a regular member after the transfer.
settings.noOtherAdmins: No other approved members to transfer admin role to.
settings.memberOfOrganizations: You are a member of {count} organization(s).
settings.leaveOrganizationDesc: Remove yourself from {name}. You will lose access to all data within this organization.
settings.leaveOrganizationAdminDesc: As an admin, you can only leave if there is at least one other admin.
settings.confirmLeaveOrg: Are you sure you want to leave "{name}"? You will lose access to all organization data.
settings.staffingDefaultsDesc: Set the default minimum staff required per shift. These values pre-fill the Staff Requirements table when creating a new schedule.

handover.title: Hand-off Report
handover.readOnly: This report is from a previous date and is read-only
handover.handoverExistsForShiftToday: A handover report already exists for today for that shift.
handover.noExistingHandoffToDuplicate: No existing hand-off found to duplicate for this patient.
handover.duplicateToTodayTitle: Duplicate to today (copies medical info, clears daily notes)
handover.noHistoryForPatient: No handover history found for this patient.
handover.historyFooterHint: Click any entry to view or edit that handover report
handover.noHandoffReportForShift: No hand-off report exists for that shift. Use Duplicate to today's date to create it.
handover.someRecordsNotDeleted: Some records could not be deleted. Please try again.
handover.noHandoffToOpen: No hand-off report exists to open. Use Duplicate to today's date (or add a new patient) to create one.
handover.handoffReportSettingsDesc: Configure how hand-off reports are created for each patient.
handover.dailyReportDesc: One report per patient per day
handover.diagnosisSuggestionsDesc: Manage the diagnoses that appear in autocomplete dropdowns. Nurses can also add new diagnoses on the fly when creating a report.
handover.noDiagnosesConfigured: No diagnoses configured. Defaults will be used.
handover.createFirstHandoffDesc: Create your first hand-off report to get started. Patient details are captured directly in the report.

templates.title: Schedule Templates
templates.noTemplatesDesc: Finalize a schedule, then save it as a template to reuse later.

scheduler.title: Schedule Planner
scheduler.scheduleInputMethodDesc: Choose how to provide nurse schedule data for optimization.
scheduler.scanExistingSchedules: Scan existing paper/PDF schedules with OCR
scheduler.importPreferencesDesc: CSV/Excel from eEspresso, paste, or manual entry
scheduler.fromTemplateDesc: Start from a previously saved schedule
scheduler.uploadScheduleImagesDesc: Upload screenshots or photos of your current schedule. We'll extract the data using OCR.
scheduler.loadFromTemplateDesc: Select a previously saved schedule template. The nurse roster and shift pattern will be projected onto your selected date range.
scheduler.guidedWorkflowDesc: Follow the next action below to complete scheduling with fewer clicks.
scheduler.finalizedSavedMessage: Your schedule has been finalized and saved to the database.
scheduler.draftSavedContinueMessage: Draft saved. You can leave now and continue later from Schedule Management.
scheduler.reviewAndFinalizeMessage: Review your optimized schedule below. Click 'Finalize & Save' to save it permanently.
scheduler.confirmDeleteDraft: Are you sure you want to delete this draft? This cannot be undone.
scheduler.refinementRequestDescription: Describe what you'd like to improve. e.g. "Ensure more weekend coverage" or "Give Nurse Jane fewer night shifts"
scheduler.schedulingRulesDescription: These rules guide the AI optimizer. One rule per line. They are saved to your organization for reuse.
scheduler.schedulingRulesPlaceholder:
1. No more than 5 consecutive working days
2. Balance workload across all nurses
3. Senior nurses get shift preference
scheduler.vsContractTargetLowerBetter: vs contract target · lower is better
scheduler.allNursesAssigned: All nurses already assigned to this day
scheduler.pleaseSignInToSaveNurses: Please sign in to save nurses
scheduler.failedToFetchNurses: Failed to fetch existing nurses. Please try again.
scheduler.nursesCreated: {count} new nurse{count, plural, one {} other {s}} created
scheduler.startDateBeforeEndDateError: Start date must be before end date.
scheduler.periodTooShortError: Period is only {count} days. Minimum recommended is 7 days.
scheduler.periodTooLongError: Period is {count} days ({weeks} weeks). Maximum recommended is 42 days (6 weeks).
scheduler.periodNotFullWeeksWarning: Period is {count} days — not a full number of weeks. The optimizer works best with 7, 14, 21, or 28-day periods.
scheduler.dragDropAriaLabel: Drag and drop schedule screenshots here or click to upload
scheduler.reviewExtractedDataHelp: Review and edit the extracted schedule data. Click any cell to modify.
scheduler.allNursesAlreadyInSchedule: All nurses from the database are already in the schedule.
scheduler.addedNursesFromDatabase: Added {count} nurse(s) from database to the schedule.
scheduler.setMinimumStaffRequired: Set minimum staff required for each shift per day.
scheduler.resetStaffRequirementsConfirm: Reset all staff requirements to defaults?
scheduler.noEmployeeNotesYet: No employee notes yet. Click "Add Note" or add "*" in the Editable Schedule Grid to auto-detect.
scheduler.schedulerWillDescription: The scheduler will: honor Time Off Request from comments, preserve existing shift codes from OCR, fill gaps to meet staffing requirements, balance hours fairly across nurses, and enforce consecutive work day limits.
scheduler.optimizationRunningWaitDontClick: Optimization is running. Please wait — do not click Preview & Optimize again.
scheduler.optimizationInProgress: Your optimization is in progress. Please wait — this can take up to 45 seconds.
scheduler.reviewConstraintsHelp: AI has parsed the following constraints. Review and edit before optimizing.
scheduler.shiftCodesDescription: Z-prefixed codes are 12h shifts (11.25h actual). Standard codes are 8h shifts (7.5h actual). "B" suffix = returns at 19:00 same day.
scheduler.timeSlotsDescription: Time slots are categories used in self-scheduling. Each slot maps to actual shift codes.
scheduler.editSystemPromptInstructions: Edit the system prompt that guides the optimizer.
scheduler.lockedSectionsDescription: sections are auto-generated from your shift codes and cannot be edited.
scheduler.confirmResetSystemPrompt: Are you sure you want to reset the system prompt to default? All your customizations will be lost.
scheduler.understaffedDatesDescription: These dates are understaffed. Suggested nurses have capacity below their target hours.
scheduler.changesAppliedToSchedule: {count} {count, plural, one {change} other {changes}} applied to the schedule
scheduler.changesRejected: {count} {count, plural, one {change} other {changes}} rejected (invalid dates or nurses)

privacy.title: Privacy & Consent
privacy.law25Notice: In compliance with Quebec Law 25 on Personal Information Protection

complianceBanner.noCopyPhi: Do not copy, export, or screenshot PHI

schedules.noSchedulesNonAdminDesc: No finalized schedules have been published yet
schedules.scheduleNotFinalized: This schedule has not been finalized yet.

schedules.getStartedFirstSchedule: Get started by creating your first optimized schedule
schedules.confirmDeleteSchedule: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule?

inactivity.autoEndedReason: Your session was automatically ended due to inactivity to protect patient data (HIPAA compliance).
inactivity.aboutToExpire: Your session was about to expire due to inactivity.
inactivity.resumeOrSignOut: Click Resume to continue your session, or sign out now.
inactivity.forSecurity: For patient data security, your session will end due to inactivity.
inactivity.moveMouseToStay: Move your mouse or press any key to stay signed in.
